_note: Back-office curated. Records are added here from submissions that route to Kevin + the AI back-office, then pushed. ask=gift-work needed · offer=gift-work available · host=a parking spot for the bus · bus=where the bus is/headed. expires:null = standing (does not time out).

records.body: The bus is parked near Wheatland through late June, then heading to the Grass Valley area around July 1. After that it moves every couple of weeks.

Off-grid systems (solar, water, bus rig-outs), welding, repairs, building, cleaning & organizing. Offered as gift work — invite me, no price, no debt. A donation or a review is welcome, never required.

records.time_window: Around July 1, then every couple of weeks
records.body: Looking for a spot to park the bus — off-grid, self-contained, near-zero footprint — for a couple of weeks at a time, starting around July 1 near Grass Valley. I bring my hands, and I leave a place better than I found it.
